title: Robo's Armory for Better Combat
description: A weapon mod designed for the Better Combat mod.
body:
![Robo's Armory Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e0f040afa567e1274eb02dee4596ebab23324d0.png)

This is a weapon mod designed for Better Combat. It adds a variety of weapons with unique movesets and even some hand crafted custom animations and sounds.
![Losing my sanity currently.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a57887f4d8221340bdda98f11f204c9bb326889b.png)

I'd love to port this over to Fabric as I personally prefer it to Forge, but this mod was initially designed for a modpack I play with friends, most of the mods in that pack are not available for Fabric and maintaining 2 different mods for different mod loaders is far too much work for me, so unfortunately **I won't be porting this mod to Fabric** for the foreseeable future.

_The strict license is due to people having previously stolen and reposted my mods without my permission. You are free to use this mod in your modpacks here on Modrinth. For any other inquiry, please contact me through the Discord link provided._
